title: Alamparai Fort
tagline: Alamparai Fort — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The ruins of Alamparai Fort (also called Alampara) lie near Kadappakkam in India, a village 50 km from Mamallapuram on the land overlooking the sea.
overview.description: The ruins of Alamparai Fort (also called Alampara) lie near Kadappakkam in India, a village 50 km from Mamallapuram on the land overlooking the sea. Constructed in the late 17th century during the Mughal era, the Alamparai Fort once had a 100-metre long dockyard stretching into the sea, from which zari cloth, salt, and ghee were exported. During 1735 AD it was ruled by Nawab Doste Ali Khan. In 1750, for the services rendered by the famous French commander Dupleix to Subedar Muzaffar Jung, the fort was given to the French.

topPlaces.name: Anumandai
topPlaces.description: Anumandai is a village panchayat located in the Marakkanam Taluk, Viluppuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the village panchayats coming under Marakkanam block of Viluppuram district.

topPlaces.name: Vedal, Chengalpattu
topPlaces.description: Vedal is a village in the Cheyyur taluk of the Chengalpattu district of Tamil Nadu, India. In 2011, it had a population of 2,472: 1,221 male and 1,251 female.

topPlaces.name: Edaikazhinadu
topPlaces.description: Edaikazhinadu is a panchayat town in Chengalpattu district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. Nearby villages are Vennangupattu and Kadappakkam.

topPlaces.name: Cheyyur taluk
topPlaces.description: Cheyyur taluk is a taluk of Chengalpattu district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Cheyyur.

topPlaces.name: Cheyyur
topPlaces.description: Cheyyur (Tamil: [sɛjjuːr]) is a town in Chengalpattu district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Cheyyur is surrounded by four sub-areas: North, East, South and West Cheyyur.

topPlaces.name: Endiyur
topPlaces.description: Endiyur is a village panchayat located in Tindivanam, in the Villupuram district of Tamil-Nadu, India. The native language of the village is Tamil.

topPlaces.name: Marakkanam
topPlaces.description: Marakkanam is a developing town and taluk in Villupuram district of Tamil Nadu. It is well connected to the state capital Chennai and the nearby union territory of Puducherry by the East Coast Road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Alamparai Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Alamparai Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Alamparai Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Alamparai Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Alamparai Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Alamparai Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Alamparai Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Alamparai Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Anumandai, Vedal, Chengalpattu, Edaikazhinadu, Cheyyur taluk, Cheyyur.
